\tzpentry{ID5805}{Vimana Quantum Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5805 introduces Vimana Quantum Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{Vimana}} = \Module\left[\begin{aligned} &T_{\text{gyro}} = \frac{1}{2}\omega_{\text{gyro}} \cdot \mathbb{I}_{\text{gyro}} \cdot \omega_{\text{gyro}}; \\ &T_{\text{field}} = \frac{\varepsilon_0}{2} \int_{\mathbb{R}^3} \left(\frac{\partial\mathbf{A}}{\partial t}\right)^2 d^3x; \\ &U_{\text{mag}} = -\boldsymbol{\mu}_{\text{total}}[t] \cdot \mathbf{B}_{\text{external}} + U_{\text{self}}[d[t]]; \\ &\mathcal{L}_{\text{coupling}} = \frac{g \mu_B}{\hbar} \mathbf{L}_{\text{mech}} \cdot \boldsymbol{\mu}_{\text{total}}[t] \end{aligned}\right] \end{equation}
